title: MCĂ—Authentication
description: A plugin made for easily authenticating users in offline servers.
body:
MCĂ—Authentication is a simple plugin, made for authenticating users in offline servers.
It also automatically authenticates registered players playing on an Official Minecraft copy, provided they pass an automated security check.

<details>
<summary>Security Check</summary>
When logging in, the plugin automatically logs the user's IP adress into the Database.
Should the last known IP adress differ from the current one, the user is asked to enter their password.
</details>
